hooks.command: echo 'React Native project loaded. Stack: React Native + TypeScript strict + Expo (or bare RN) + React Navigation + React Query. Package manager: npm. Test runner: Jest + React Native Testing Library. Use StyleSheet.create() for all styles. Use expo-secure-store for sensitive data. Always run npm run lint && npm test before committing.'

echo 'Context reminder: React Native project. FlatList/FlashList for lists (never ScrollView+map). StyleSheet.create() — no inline styles. Design tokens in src/constants/. expo-secure-store for tokens (not AsyncStorage). Typed React Navigation. No any types. React.memo for list items.'
FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
node -e "try { const n = require('node-notifier'); n.notify({ title: 'Claude Code', message: 'Waiting for your input' }); } catch(e) { /* skip */ }"
